message:
fix(reactor): harden Registration deregistration with catch_unwind for panic safety

Wrap all calls to reactor.deregister_by_token() in panic::catch_unwind to
prevent panicking reactor implementations from crashing the process:

- In the Drop impl: a panic during deregister would cause a double-panic and
  process abort. Now caught and silently swallowed via deregister_no_panic(),
  with only a single deregister attempt made (no retry after panic).

- In the explicit deregister() method: panics are caught and converted to
  io::Error(Other, "reactor deregister panicked") via panicked_deregister_result(),
  surfacing the failure as a recoverable error instead of unwinding.

New helper functions:
- deregister_no_panic(): wraps deregister_by_token in catch_unwind(AssertUnwindSafe(...))
- panicked_deregister_result(): returns a descriptive io::Error for the panic case

New tests with PanickingReactor mock:
- drop_swallows_panicking_reactor_deregister: verifies Drop doesn't propagate panic
- explicit_deregister_panicking_reactor_returns_error: verifies explicit path returns Err

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
